title: FRACTION_ORDER_ANETAKI_SEAL — third prospective seal: fraction relative-value order vs Anetaki II face-δ (frontier F10, gate D)
claim_layer: L2/L3 (numeral-notation structure; klasmatogram relative-value order); no licence claimed or consumed

positive_controls_run_first.PC1_pipeline_recovery: PASS — noiseless planted-value regeneration of the 20 primary sequence tokens: 12/12 claimed direct pairs direction-correct, q monotone in vote count; noisy(0.2) variant mean direction accuracy 0.799 (descriptive, matches noise rate)
positive_controls_run_first.PC2_scorer_roundtrip: PASS — synthetic descending six-sign face-δ scores OURS_SUPPORTED (9/9 pairs, binom p .00195); reversed scores OURS_REFUTED (0/9)

negative_controls.NC1_order_shuffle: PASS — real cross-document unanimity W=16; shuffle null (20,000 reps) p = 0.0442
negative_controls.NC2_frequency_adversary: PASS — 5 claimed pairs contradict glyph-frequency rank (A>B, JE>B, E>L2, H>K, K>L2); channel not reducible to frequency
negative_controls.NC3_relabeling: PASS — matrix exactly equivariant under letter permutation

derivation_summary.input: corpus/silver/inscriptions_structured.json ONLY (1,341 inscriptions); 26 multi-sign fraction sequence tokens, 20 in the primary LM I horizon (18 docs: HT/KH/ZA)
derivation_summary.p_desc_posterior: Beta(8,2) prior; the single arithmetic-checkable primary instance (ZA 8: E written before J) VIOLATES the descending convention -> posterior Beta(8,3), mean 0.727; sensitivity band Beta(4,1)/Beta(16,4) in the seal
derivation_summary.primary_matrix: 25 claims: 3 arithmetic (J>E, JE>J, JE>E @0.99), 12 sequence-vote (J>B @0.957 4-doc-unanimous; K>L2 @0.857; 10 single-doc @0.727), 10 transitive (@0.62-0.72); all other pairs ABSTAIN
derivation_summary.map_orderings: 972 tied maximum-likelihood linear extensions over 10 letters (top: JE>J>...>{A,E,B,H,K}>L2>{L4,L6}); P(all 25 claims correct) = 0.0011 — per-pair confidences are the committed content, not the total order
derivation_summary.secondary_tier_non_primary: L>E (PH7b, MM-II-adjacent), F>K (PH1b), L>L2 (ZA11a) @0.727 — quarantined from the primary gate per A-FD6

corazza_comparator: verified 2026-07-08 vs secondary source reproducing the paper's table; identical to repo scripts/comparison/metrology.py::CORAZZA_2021; citation doi:10.1016/j.jas.2020.105214

contamination_audit.C1_public_pdf: PASS — Kanta et al. 2024 pdftotext: 0 Aegean fraction glyphs, 0 identity patterns near 'fraction'; public surface = existence + novelty statement only (pp. 41-42)
contamination_audit.C2_epoch001_register: PASS — row 35 quarantine=unpublished_content; fringe rows 37-39 carry no fraction patterns
contamination_audit.C3_fringe_blind: PASS — blind pattern counts only (pdf:1, wayback html:5); fringe content never read
contamination_audit.C5_no_new_search: PASS — EPOCH-001 14-route receipt (2026-07-08) is the currency check; no re-exposure
contamination_audit.known_leak_discounted: the editors' public 'different from Corazza' statement earns zero credit in scoring; only frozen pair directions score

seal.ordinal: third Anetaki-targeting seal; zero overlap with ANETAKI_FINAL_EDITION_DELTA_SEAL (sign-groups) and M_ANETAKI_LATTICE_DELTA_SEAL (lattice deltas)

information_budget: committed ~15 direct + 10 implied direction bits; scoring n capped at C(6,2)=15 pairs; P(NO_POWER) est. 0.3-0.4 (non-binding)
effective_n_note: doc-level dedup enforced (KH11's 3 identical tokens = 1 vote); site clustering visible (J>B: HT+KH; K>L2: KH only) and recorded in docs_for
